description:
## Deep Component Audit — hx-message-bar

**Component directory:** `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-message-bar/`

### wc-mcp Tools — USE THESE
- `score_component`, `get_component`, `analyze_accessibility`, `list_css_parts`, `list_events`, `list_slots`, `get_design_tokens`
- **Report wc-mcp bugs to `/Volumes/Development/booked/wc-tools` board.**

### Audit Scope
1. **Design Tokens** — `--hx-` tokens. Background per variant, icon color, close button. Dark mode.
2. **Accessibility** — WCAG 2.1 AA. role="status" or "alert". Live region. Dismissible keyboard support.
3. **Functionality** — Variants (info, success, warning, error). Dismissible. Actions slot. Icon customization. Sticky/fixed positioning.
4. **TypeScript** — Strict. No `any`.
5. **CSS/Styling** — Shadow DOM. CSS Parts. Full-width layout. Responsive.
6. **CEM Accuracy** — All API documented.
7. **Tests** — 80%+ coverage. Variants. Dismiss. ARIA roles. Actions.
8. **Storybook** — All variants. Dismissible. With actions. Sticky.
9. **Drupal Compatibility** — Drupal messages replacement. Twig-friendly.
10. **Portability** — CDN-ready.

### Deliverable
Detailed audit report. Fix CRITICAL+HIGH. Document rest.
title: Deep Audit v2: hx-message-bar
